objective: Create a unified research object schema and source coverage map for indexes and industry indexes.
forbidden: Do not backfill current snapshots into historical records.
Do not read unrelated agent scratch context.
acceptance_criteria: Schema includes identity, type, horizon, as-of date, confidence, and invalidation fields.
Sample universe matches every required schema field.
All configured sample objects have usable price coverage.
Coverage matrix records downstream allowed/research-only status.
failure_conditions: Macro PIT panel missing when macro coverage is claimed.
Required schema field missing from sample universe.
Current snapshot source allowed for historical backtest.
quality_gates: Contract check has no fail rows.
